from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass
class BaseEntity:
    id: int
    created_at: str
    updated_at: str
    is_active: bool


@dataclass
class User(BaseEntity):
    name: str
    email: str


@dataclass
class Order(BaseEntity):
    total: float
    status: str


@dataclass
class Product(BaseEntity):
    name: str
    price: float
    stock: int


@dataclass
class Payment(BaseEntity):
    amount: float
    currency: str
    transaction_id: str
